obligation.goal: forall i : Fin.t n, eq (nth (nth xss i) i) (nth (diagonal xss) i)

goals.goal: forall i : Fin.t 0, eq (nth (nth xss i) i) (nth (diagonal xss) i)

hypotheses:
IHn : forall (xss : Vector.t (Vector.t A n) n) (i : Fin.t n),
eq (nth (nth xss i) i) (nth (diagonal xss) i)
goals.goal: forall i : Fin.t (S n), eq (nth (nth xss i) i) (nth (diagonal xss) i)

attempts: induction n as [|n' IH]; intros xss i; destruct i as [|i']. all: try reflexivity. rewrite (nth_unfold xss (FS i')). rewrite (nth_unfold (tail xss !! i') (FS i')). rewrite (map_spec tail (tail xss) i'). simpl; apply (IH (map tail (tail xss)) i').

induction n as [|n IH]; intros A xss i.
- inversion i.
- destruct i as [|i'].
-- reflexivity.
-- simpl. rewrite <- IH with (A:=A) (xss:= map tail (tail xss)) (i:=i').

induction n.
- intros xss i; inversion i.
- intros xss i; destruct i as [ | i'].
-- simpl; reflexivity.
-- destruct xss as [r rs]; simpl. assert (nth_tail : forall (v : Vector.t A (S n)) (j : Fin.t n), nth v (FS j) = nth (tail v) j)
      by (intros v j; destruct v; [discriminate | reflexivity]). assert (nth_map_tail : forall (rs' : Vector.t (Vector.t A (S n)) n) (j : Fin.t n), nth (map tail rs') j = tail (nth rs' j))
      by (induction rs'; intros j; destruct j; simpl; auto; apply IHrs'). rewrite (nth_tail (nth rs i') i'), <- (nth_map_tail rs i'). apply (IH (map tail rs) i').

refine (let lemma_gen (A : Type) := fix lemma_gen (n : nat) (rows : Vector.t (Vector.t A (S n)) n) (i j : Fin.t n) {struct rows} : nth (nth rows i) (FS j) = nth (nth (map tail rows) i) j :=
  match rows with
  | VNil => fun i j => match i with end
  | VCons n' r rs => fun i j =>
    match i with
    | FZ n' => 
      match j with
      | FZ n' => 
        match r with
        | VCons n'' x xs => eq_refl
        end
      | FS j' => 
        match r with
        | VCons n'' x xs => eq_refl
        end
      end
    | FS i' => lemma_gen n' rs i' j
    end
  end in
  let rec proof (A : Type) (n : nat) (xss : Vector.t (Vector.t A n) n) (i : Fin.t n) {struct n} : eq (nth (nth xss i) i) (nth (diagonal xss) i) :=
    match n as n0 return (forall (xss : Vector.t (Vector.t A n0) n0) (i : Fin.t n0), eq (nth (nth xss i) i) (nth (diagonal xss) i)) with
    | 0 => fun xss i => match i with end
    | S n' => fun xss i =>
      match i with
      | FZ n' => fun xss =>
        match xss with
        | VCons n'' row rows => 
          match row with
          | VCons n''' x xs => eq_refl
          end
        end
      | FS i' => fun xss =>
        match xss with
        | VCons n'' row rows => 
          eq_trans (lemma_gen A n' rows i' i') (proof A n' (map tail rows) i')
        end
      end xss
    end
  in proof A n xss i).

- inversion i.
- destruct i as [|i'].
-- reflexivity.

refine (let lemma_gen (A : Type) := fix lemma_gen (n : nat) (rows : Vector.t (Vector.t A (S n)) n) (i j : Fin.t n) {struct rows} : nth (nth rows i) (FS j) = nth (nth (map tail rows) i) j :=
  match rows with
  | VNil => fun i j => match i with end
  | VCons n' r rs => fun i j =>
    match i with
    | FZ n' => 
      match j with
      | FZ n' => 
        match r with
        | VCons n'' x xs => eq_refl
        end
      | FS j' => 
        match r with
        | VCons n'' x xs => eq_refl
        end
      end
    | FS i' => lemma_gen n' rs i' j
    end
  end in
  let rec proof (A : Type) (n : nat) (xss : Vector.t (Vector.t A n) n) (i : Fin.t n) {struct n} : eq (nth (nth xss i) i) (nth (diagonal xss) i) :=
    match n as n0 return (forall (xss : Vector.t (Vector.t A n0) n0) (i : Fin.t n0), eq (nth (nth xss i) i) (nth (diagonal xss) i)) with
    | 0 => fun xss i => match i with end
    | S n' => fun xss i =>
      match i with
      | FZ n' => fun xss =>
        match xss with
        | VCons n'' row rows => 
          match row with
          | VCons n''' x xs => eq_refl
          end
        end
      | FS i' => fun xss =>
        match xss with
        | VCons n'' row rows => 
          eq_trans (lemma_gen A n' rows i' i') (proof A n' (map tail rows) i')
        end
      end xss
    end
  in proof A n xss i).

attempts:
intros xss i; destruct i as [ | i'].
- simpl; reflexivity.
- destruct xss as [r rs]; simpl. assert (nth_tail : forall (v : Vector.t A (S n)) (j : Fin.t n), nth v (FS j) = nth (tail v) j)
      by (intros v j; destruct v; [discriminate | reflexivity]). assert (nth_map_tail : forall (rs' : Vector.t (Vector.t A (S n)) n) (j : Fin.t n), nth (map tail rs') j = tail (nth rs' j))
      by (induction rs'; intros j; destruct j; simpl; auto; apply IHrs'). rewrite (nth_tail (nth rs i') i'), <- (nth_map_tail rs i'). apply (IH (map tail rs) i').

inversion xss as [| n0 x xs H].
- discriminate H.
- subst n0; intro i; case i as [ | i'].
-- simpl; apply (nth_unfold x FZ).
-- simpl; rewrite (nth_unfold (nth xs i') (FS i')); rewrite (map_spec tail xs i'); apply IHn.

intros i. case i; intros.
- reflexivity.
- rewrite nth_unfold with (xs := nth (tail xss) i') (i := FS i'). rewrite map_spec with (f := tail) (xs := tail xss) (i := i'). apply IHn.

assert (H_nth_fs : forall A n (v : Vector.t A (S n)) (i : Fin.t n), nth v (FS i) = nth (tail v) i) by
  (intros A n v i; destruct v; [inversion i | simpl; reflexivity]). assert (H_nth_map_tail : forall A n (v : Vector.t (Vector.t A (S n)) n) (i : Fin.t n), nth (map tail v) i = tail (nth v i)) by
  (induction v; intros i; [inversion i | case i; simpl; [reflexivity | apply IHv]]). destruct xss as [| h t]; [intro i; inversion i | intro i; case i; [reflexivity | intro i'; simpl; rewrite H_nth_fs; rewrite <- H_nth_map_tail; apply IHn]].

intros i. destruct i; [reflexivity|]. destruct xss as [| h t]; [inversion i|]. destruct h as [| a h']; [inversion i|]. simpl. destruct (nth t i) as [| b r] eqn:H; [inversion i|]. simpl. replace r with (nth (map tail t) i) by (rewrite H; simpl; reflexivity). apply IHn.

intro i. destruct i as [|i'].
- rewrite !nth_unfold; simpl; reflexivity.
- rewrite !nth_unfold; simpl; rewrite <- (map_spec tail (tail xss) i'); apply (IHn (map tail (tail xss)) i').
intros i; destruct i as [| i']; [simpl; reflexivity | simpl; rewrite (nth_unfold xss (FS i')), (nth_unfold (tail xss !! i') (FS i')), (map_spec tail (tail xss) i'); apply IHn].

destruct xss as [ | n firstRow restRows]; [discriminate|]. intro i; destruct i as [ | k].
- simpl; reflexivity.
- assert (nth_tail : forall (v : Vector.t A (S n)) (j : Fin.t n), nth v (FS j) = nth (tail v) j)
      by (intro v; destruct v; reflexivity). assert (tail_nth_map : forall (vs : Vector.t (Vector.t A (S n)) n) (j : Fin.t n), tail (nth vs j) = nth (map tail vs) j)
      by (induction vs; intro j; [ inversion j | destruct j; [reflexivity | apply IHvs] ]). rewrite (nth_tail (nth restRows k) k), (tail_nth_map restRows k). apply IHn.

intro i; case i; [simpl; reflexivity | intro i'; destruct xss as [h t]; simpl; set (w := map tail t); assert (nth_succ: forall n0 (w0 : Vector.t A (S n0)) (j : Fin.t n0), nth w0 (FS j) = nth (tail w0) j) by (induction w0; intros j; [inversion j | reflexivity]); assert (nth_map_tail: forall n0 (v0 : Vector.t (Vector.t A (S n0)) n0) (i0 : Fin.t n0), nth (map tail v0) i0 = tail (nth v0 i0)) by (induction v0; intros i0; [inversion i0 | simpl; destruct i0 as [| i'']; [reflexivity | simpl; apply IHv0]]); assert (H: nth (nth t i') (FS i') = nth (nth w i') i') by (rewrite (nth_succ n (nth t i') i'); rewrite (nth_map_tail n t i'); reflexivity); rewrite H; apply IHn].

- simpl; reflexivity.
- destruct xss as [r rs]; simpl. assert (nth_tail : forall (v : Vector.t A (S n)) (j : Fin.t n), nth v (FS j) = nth (tail v) j)
      by (intros v j; destruct v; [discriminate | reflexivity]). assert (nth_map_tail : forall (rs' : Vector.t (Vector.t A (S n)) n) (j : Fin.t n), nth (map tail rs') j = tail (nth rs' j))
